netapp.aws.aws_netapp_cvs_active_directo.short_description: NetApp AWS CloudVolumes Service Manage Active Directory.
netapp.aws.aws_netapp_cvs_active_directo.description: Create, Update, Delete ActiveDirectory on AWS Cloud Volumes Service.

state.description: Whether the specified ActiveDirectory should exist or not.

region.description: The region to which the Active Directory credentials are associated.

domain.description: Name of the Active Directory domain

DNS.description: DNS server address for the Active Directory domain Required when C(state=present) Required when C(state=present), to modify ActiveDirectory properties.

username.description: Username of the Active Directory domain administrator

password.description: Password of the Active Directory domain administrator Required when C(state=present), to modify ActiveDirectory properties

netapp.aws.aws_netapp_cvs_filesystems.short_description: NetApp AWS Cloud Volumes Service Manage FileSystem.
netapp.aws.aws_netapp_cvs_filesystems.description: Create, Update, Delete fileSystem on AWS Cloud Volumes Service.

state.description: Whether the specified fileSystem should exist or not.

region.description: The region to which the filesystem belongs to.

quotaInBytes.description: Size of the filesystem Required for create

exportPolicy.description: The policy rules to export the filesystem

netapp.aws.aws_netapp_cvs_pool.short_description: NetApp AWS Cloud Volumes Service Manage Pools.
netapp.aws.aws_netapp_cvs_pool.description: Create, Update, Delete Pool on AWS Cloud Volumes Service.

state.description: Whether the specified pool should exist or not.

region.description: The region to which the Pool is associated.

name.description: pool name ( The human readable name of the Pool ) name can be used for create, update and delete operations

serviceLevel.description: The service level of the Pool can be used with pool create, update operations

sizeInBytes.description: Size of the Pool in bytes can be used with pool create, update operations minimum value is 4000000000000 bytes

vendorID.description: A vendor ID for the Pool. E.g. an ID allocated by a vendor service for the Pool. can be used with pool create, update operations must be unique

from_name.description: rename the existing pool name ( The human readable name of the Pool ) I(from_name) is the existing name, and I(name) the new name can be used with update operation

netapp.aws.aws_netapp_cvs_snapshots.short_description: NetApp AWS Cloud Volumes Service Manage Snapshots.
netapp.aws.aws_netapp_cvs_snapshots.description: Create, Update, Delete Snapshot on AWS Cloud Volumes Service.

state.description: Whether the specified snapshot should exist or not.

region.description: The region to which the snapshot belongs to.

fileSystemId.description: Name or Id of the filesystem. Required for create operation

from_name.description: ID or Name of the snapshot to rename. Required to create an snapshot called 'name' by renaming 'from_name'.
